description: SDT-grounded need-domain vocabulary for the SDT head (idea.md §2 'functional substrates', §3.2 SDT head). Condition-agnostic — same vocabulary applies regardless of condition pack.

needs.label: Autonomy
needs.description: Experience of acting from genuine self-direction. Thwarted when externally controlled, pressured, or unable to act on one's own values.

needs.label: Competence
needs.description: Experience of effectance and mastery. Thwarted when consistently failing, evaluated harshly, or kept from challenges one can grow into.

needs.label: Relatedness
needs.description: Experience of meaningful connection. Thwarted when belonging is precarious, conditional, or absent.

domains.label: Work or studies
domains.description: Paid or unpaid productive activity, schooling, career trajectory.

domains.label: Family of origin or chosen family
Self-direction
domains.description: The user's relationship with their own goals, values, and life trajectory.

domains.label: Other
domains.description: Catch-all when domain doesn't fit the above. Free-text qualifier expected.

framing_language_hints.description: Approximate framings the generation prompt can use when SDT head identifies a thwarted need. NOT user-facing copy verbatim — hints for register. Lean toward the user's own language whenever possible; these are fallbacks.
autonomy: feeling like things are happening to you rather than with you
wanting to choose, not be chosen for
competence: needing something to feel like it lands when you do it
looking for somewhere you can be good at something
relatedness: needing someone to actually see this
wanting to belong without having to perform
looking for closeness that doesn't cost so much
